title: tarenna nitiduloides
intro: Tarenna nitiduloides, also known as the East Indian tarenna, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tarenna nitiduloides include relief from fever, inflammation, and infections, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
